issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.
Docker images are referenced without checksums, which could allow tampering.

scenarios.name: Scale n8n to queue mode with Redis workers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment sets EXECUTIONS_MODE=queue, QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_HOST, shares N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY across services using YAML anchors, and scales workers with docker compose up -d --scale n8n-worker=N exactly as documented; baseline guesses generic Redis env vars and misses encryption key sharing requirement.

scenarios.name: Restore encrypted credentials onto a fresh n8n host with new encryption key
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs n8n export:credentials --all --decrypted on source then n8n import:credentials --input=creds.json on target as documented; baseline tries to copy the SQLite/Postgres data directly and fails to address the encryption key mismatch.
